What exactly defines an engaged session?
Is it dwell time?
Is it scroll?
What is the exact definition here?
Yeah, GA4, by default, defines an engaged session as dwell time of more than a minute.
Or if somebody clicks a link and goes to another page.
So if either of those things happen, that's an engaged session.
The engaged session, the dwell time, you can actually configure it in Google Analytics if you have admin access.
So you can change it to like two minutes, three minutes, or whatever.
Default, I know, is one minute.
So that's how it's defined.
